# Output File Templates

## tokens.css — CSS Custom Properties

### Structure
```css
/* ===========================================
 * Design Tokens — Generated by design-tokens skill
 * Format: [W3C DTCG | CTI]
 * Generated: [timestamp]
 * =========================================== */

/* --- Primitive Tokens --- */
:root {
  /* Color Primitives */
  --color-primitive-blue-500: #4b64ff;
  --color-primitive-blue-600: #3a50cc;
  --color-primitive-blue-50: #eeeef8;
  --color-primitive-gray-900: #0d0d11;
  --color-primitive-gray-50: #fafafa;
  --color-primitive-white: #ffffff;

  /* Spacing Primitives */
  --spacing-primitive-4: 4px;
  --spacing-primitive-8: 8px;
  --spacing-primitive-16: 16px;
  --spacing-primitive-24: 24px;

  /* Radius Primitives */
  --radius-primitive-4: 4px;
  --radius-primitive-8: 8px;
  --radius-primitive-full: 9999px;
}

/* --- Semantic Tokens (Light Theme — Default) --- */
:root {
  /* Background */
  --color-bg-primary: var(--color-primitive-white);
  --color-bg-primary-hover: var(--color-primitive-gray-50);
  --color-bg-brand: var(--color-primitive-blue-500);
  --color-bg-brand-hover: var(--color-primitive-blue-600);

  /* Text */
  --color-text-primary: var(--color-primitive-gray-900);
  --color-text-on-brand: var(--color-primitive-white);
  --color-text-brand: var(--color-primitive-blue-500);

  /* Border */
  --color-border-default: var(--color-primitive-gray-50);

  /* Spacing */
  --spacing-padding-sm: var(--spacing-primitive-8);
  --spacing-padding-md: var(--spacing-primitive-16);
  --spacing-padding-lg: var(--spacing-primitive-24);

  /* Radius */
  --radius-sm: var(--radius-primitive-4);
  --radius-md: var(--radius-primitive-8);
  --radius-full: var(--radius-primitive-full);
}

/* --- Semantic Tokens (Dark Theme) --- */
[data-theme="dark"] {
  --color-bg-primary: var(--color-primitive-gray-900);
  --color-bg-primary-hover: #1a1a2e;
  --color-text-primary: var(--color-primitive-white);
  --color-text-brand: var(--color-primitive-blue-50);
  --color-border-default: #2a2a3e;
}

/* --- Component Tokens --- */
:root {
  /* Button */
  --color-button-bg-accent: var(--color-bg-brand);
  --color-button-bg-accent-hover: var(--color-bg-brand-hover);
  --color-button-text-accent: var(--color-text-on-brand);
}
```

### Rules
- Primitives go under `:root` — they never change per theme
- Default-theme semantic tokens go under `:root` (after primitives)
- Alternate themes go under `[data-theme="<mode-name>"]` selectors
- Component tokens go under `:root` (they reference semantic vars which auto-switch per theme)
- Use `var()` references where the source is another token
- Use resolved hex values only when the value doesn't correspond to a defined primitive
- Token names: `--{path-with-dashes}` (replace `/` and `.` with `-`)
- Typography tokens expand to individual properties (no shorthand):
  ```css
  --font-family-body: "Inter", sans-serif;
  --font-size-body: 16px;
  --font-weight-body: 400;
  --font-line-height-body: 1.5;
  --font-letter-spacing-body: 0;
  ```
- Shadow tokens use valid `box-shadow` shorthand:
  ```css
  --shadow-md: 0px 2px 4px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
  ```

---

## tokens.scss — SCSS Variables

### Structure
```scss
// ===========================================
// Design Tokens — Generated by design-tokens skill
// Format: [W3C DTCG | CTI]
// ===========================================

// --- Primitive Tokens ---
$color-primitive-blue-500: #4b64ff;
$color-primitive-blue-600: #3a50cc;
$color-primitive-gray-900: #0d0d11;
$color-primitive-white: #ffffff;

$spacing-primitive-4: 4px;
$spacing-primitive-8: 8px;
$spacing-primitive-16: 16px;

$radius-primitive-4: 4px;
$radius-primitive-8: 8px;
$radius-primitive-full: 9999px;

// --- Semantic Tokens ---
$color-bg-primary: $color-primitive-white;
$color-bg-brand: $color-primitive-blue-500;
$color-text-primary: $color-primitive-gray-900;
$spacing-padding-sm: $spacing-primitive-8;
$spacing-padding-md: $spacing-primitive-16;
$radius-sm: $radius-primitive-4;
$radius-md: $radius-primitive-8;

// --- Component Tokens ---
$color-button-bg-accent: $color-bg-brand;
$color-button-text-accent: $color-primitive-white;

// --- Theme Maps ---
$themes: (
  "light": (
    "color-bg-primary": $color-primitive-white,
    "color-text-primary": $color-primitive-gray-900,
    "color-text-brand": $color-primitive-blue-500,
    "color-border-default": #fafafa,
  ),
  "dark": (
    "color-bg-primary": $color-primitive-gray-900,
    "color-text-primary": $color-primitive-white,
    "color-text-brand": #eeeef8,
    "color-border-default": #2a2a3e,
  ),
);

// --- Theme Mixin ---
@mixin theme($theme-name) {
  $theme: map-get($themes, $theme-name);
  @each $key, $value in $theme {
    --#{$key}: #{$value};
  }
}
```

### Rules
- SCSS variables use `$` prefix with dashes: `$color-bg-primary`
- Primitives reference raw values
- Semantic tokens reference primitive SCSS variables (not hex)
- Theme map contains only tokens that change between themes
- Provide a `@mixin theme()` for programmatic theme switching

---

## style-dictionary.config.json

### For CTI Format (Style Dictionary v3)
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://styledictionary.com/schemas/config.schema.json",
  "source": ["design-tokens/tokens.json"],
  "platforms": {
    "css": {
      "transformGroup": "css",
      "prefix": "token",
      "buildPath": "build/css/",
      "files": [
        {
          "destination": "variables.css",
          "format": "css/variables",
          "options": {
            "outputReferences": true
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "scss": {
      "transformGroup": "scss",
      "prefix": "token",
      "buildPath": "build/scss/",
      "files": [
        {
          "destination": "_variables.scss",
          "format": "scss/variables",
          "options": {
            "outputReferences": true
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "js": {
      "transformGroup": "js",
      "buildPath": "build/js/",
      "files": [
        {
          "destination": "tokens.js",
          "format": "javascript/es6"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

### For W3C DTCG Format (Style Dictionary v4)
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://styledictionary.com/schemas/config.schema.json",
  "source": ["design-tokens/tokens.json"],
  "preprocessors": ["tokens-studio"],
  "platforms": {
    "css": {
      "transformGroup": "css",
      "prefix": "token",
      "buildPath": "build/css/",
      "files": [
        {
          "destination": "variables.css",
          "format": "css/variables",
          "options": {
            "outputReferences": true
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "scss": {
      "transformGroup": "scss",
      "prefix": "token",
      "buildPath": "build/scss/",
      "files": [
        {
          "destination": "_variables.scss",
          "format": "scss/variables",
          "options": {
            "outputReferences": true
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

**Note:** Style Dictionary v4 natively supports W3C DTCG format (`$value`, `$type`). For v3, add the `@tokens-studio/sd-transforms` package which registers the `tokens-studio` preprocessor.

### Build Command
```bash
npx style-dictionary build --config design-tokens/style-dictionary.config.json
```

---

## Output Directory Structure

```
design-tokens/
  tokens.json                      # Full token tree (W3C or CTI format)
  tokens.css                       # CSS custom properties with theme selectors
  tokens.scss                      # SCSS variables and theme maps
  style-dictionary.config.json     # Style Dictionary build config
```

Default output path: `./design-tokens/` in the current working directory. Configurable — ask the user if they want a different path.
